description_long: This house is a modern, boxy residential structure surrounded by a landscaped yard with numerous trees featuring purple foliage. The building is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one of which is dark and the other light, connected by a central outdoor patio area with a pool and wooden decking. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding garden. The property includes paved walkways, a small garden area, and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, flat roofs, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The house appears to be situated in a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, boxy house with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard with purple-leaved trees and a central patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, pool, and the arrangement of trees and garden elements.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facade, more trees, and fewer visible windows or entry points.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the white volume of the house, the patio, and the transition to the garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark volume of the house, additional landscaping, and the paved walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, flush with the facade, and is accessed via a paved path with minimal overhang and no porch.
